name: Romania's Got Talent
overview: Românii au talent is a TV show which first aired on 18 February 2011. The project is a franchise of Got Talent, developed by Simco Limited. The hosts of the show are Smiley and Pavel Bartoş. The judges are the Romanian singer Andra, a Pro TV star and presenter Andi Moisescu, TV presenter Mihai Petre and Florin Calinescu,Romanian actor, theatre director and television host. The grand prize is 120.000€.

trailers.title: Românii au talent Sezonul 16 - Promo PRO TV
